p: Wide child A focuses on short operational fragments combined with links and a table. It is one of many root siblings.
Invalid wide A literal broken-wide-a://value and missing title .

ac:rich-text-body.p: Wide A info macro has mixed text and <escaped> source.

p: The appendix is synthetic review clutter: owner admin, reviewer nobody, date 2026-05-04, window 00:00-23:59, priority P0/P1/P2, and markers 0, 1, many. It intentionally repeats labels that real teams copy between pages.
Appendix prose includes escaped XML <appendix attr="value">, Cyrillic пример, inline appendixCheck(), and code literal /display/CX/Missing Appendix Literal.
Wide A density tail with repeated sibling notes, root sibling count many, single owner admin, zero local attachment expectation, and broken-wide-a-tail://literal.
